items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 感叹每天都能发现有人让 LLM 做出奇特有趣的事情，不断提醒自己：我们仍处于这项神奇技术的超级早期阶段。
items.content_en: Agarwal marvels that every day someone manages to get LLMs to do something weird and interesting. A reminder that we're still in the super early innings of figuring out what we can build with this technology.

items.author: Alex Albert
items.content_zh: Alex Albert 表示 Claude Code 桌面端新版本带来了大量新功能和性能改进。他发现在 Cowork 和 Code 之间切换，已经不太需要打开其他应用甚至终端来完成大部分工作了。
items.content_en: Alex Albert highlights the new Claude Code desktop release with tons of new features and performance improvements. Between Cowork and Code, he's found he barely needs to open other apps — or even his terminal — to do most of his work now.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.content_zh: Masad 感叹以前需要单独构建的一次性转换工具，在 Replit 上现在只是一个 skill，体现了 AI 编程平台降低开发门槛的趋势。
items.content_en: Masad notes that one-off conversion apps he used to build individually are now just a skill on Replit — reflecting how AI coding platforms are collapsing development effort.

items.author: Amjad Masad
items.content_zh: Replit 与 Razorpay 合作，印度开发者现在可以直接在 Replit 上构建应用并使用 Razorpay 支付，进一步拓展印度市场。
items.content_en: Replit partners with Razorpay, enabling Indian builders to build and accept payments directly on Replit — expanding further into the Indian market.

items.author: Cat Wu
items.content_zh: Cat Wu 介绍了 Cowork 的新特性，包括多窗口工作流、在线协作、可重新排列的工作面板等功能，大大提升了开发者的工作效率。
items.content_en: Cat Wu introduces Cowork's new features including multi-window workflows, online collaboration, and rearrangeable work panels — major productivity enhancements for builders.

items.author: David Martin
items.content_zh: Martin 指出大规模语言模型的新应用场景正在涌现，特别是在代码生成和自动化任务中。
items.content_en: Martin notes emerging use cases for large-scale language models, particularly in code generation and task automation.

items.author: Eric Shear
items.content_zh: Shear 强调了 Claude 在处理长上下文和复杂推理任务上的优势。
items.content_en: Shear emphasizes Claude's advantages in handling long contexts and complex reasoning tasks.

items.author: Gregory Melnikov
items.content_zh: Melnikov 分享了 Anthropic 最新产品更新，包括 API 改进和新的开发者工具。
items.content_en: Melnikov shares Anthropic's latest product updates including API improvements and new developer tools.
